title: RISK: send_client_error called with .ok() swallows delivery failures
description: relay/src/ws.rs lines 352, 407, 466, 514, 553: send_client_error() awaited as .await.ok() silently drops SendError. When the client channel is full or closed, the error is swallowed with no log or reconnection attempt. A solo maintainer encountering 'client stopped responding to error messages' will have zero diagnostic information. This pattern appears in BROADCAST, SET_NICKNAME, PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE, GET_KEY_PACKAGE, WHISPER handlers. Risk: operator blinded to client communication failures.
close_reason: False positive. CLAUDE.md §8: mpsc::Sender::send() Err means client disconnected — treat as clean exit, not relay error. .ok() is the documented correct pattern.
